message:
fix(anthropic): harden SSE parser with binary buffer, CRLF support, and multiline data

Rewrite streaming SSE parser to work on raw Vec<u8> instead of String,
eliminating lossy UTF-8 conversion. Add next_sse_event_boundary() for
both LF and CRLF delimiter detection. Support multi-line data: fields
and optional space after colon per SSE spec. Invalid UTF-8 now produces
a proper AnthropicError instead of silent replacement characters.

Add tests for no-space fields, multiline data, CRLF delimiters, and
split-multibyte UTF-8 across chunk boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
